{{Quote|I shall not be denied what is rightfully mine.|Seth Kabul|<ref name="Three Against the Galaxy">{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Seth Kabul''' was the brother of the noble [[Lorn Kabul]] and the uncle of [[Arista Kabul]].

==Biography==
Wanting to take over [[Kabul Industries|Lorn Kabul's mining operation]] and conspiring with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harsh]], Seth had Lorn Kabul and Arista assassinated. While Lorn Kabul died, the brave [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]] managed to save Arista's life.

With the help of Grissom and a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] called [[Tek]], who had a weakness for blowing things up, Arista managed to sabotage the mining operation, thus ruining everything Seth had planned and leaving him a ruined man.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
